_comment: Lanes are REUSABLE NATO slots (alpha..echo): the worktree is a persistent execution slot; the task/role/allowed_paths/skills are reassigned per round via the .pm bus. PM-owned (single writer). 'name' (friendly) is decoupled from 'branch' so we never have to rename a branch mid-round.
namingConvention: Slots: alpha, bravo, charlie, delta, echo (+ special-purpose like wt-modularize). A slot takes a fresh feat/<area> or chore/<area> branch per assignment. NEVER rename a branch with an open PR or mid-round. Physical `git worktree move` only when that slot's VS Code window is CLOSED.
renameDone: delta  ← slice-a-auth-tenancy dir renamed to hfc-demo-worktrees/delta; now on a clean slot/delta @ origin/main; FREE slot.
echo   ← slice-d-franchisee-dashboard dir renamed to hfc-demo-worktrees/echo; branch + in-flight franchisee work preserved. Repurpose to new work only after its PR merges.

slots.name: delta
slots._note: FREE slot — assign next backlog item via .pm/outbox/delta/; set allowed_paths + skills per task. For a real feature, branch feat/<area> off slot/delta.

slots.name: echo
slots.task: Franchisee operations dashboard UI (merge #5, holding for charlie)
slots._note: Rename dir → hfc-demo-worktrees/echo only AFTER this PR merges. DIR-COLLISION to resolve in decisions.md: exec-ui owns web/src/app/dashboard/, franchisee moves to web/src/app/franchisee/.
